scripts.reset:world: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('world_state.json')) fs.unlinkSync('world_state.json'); console.log('World reset.');"
scripts.reset:memories: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('agent_memories')) fs.rmSync('agent_memories', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.mkdirSync('agent_memories'); console.log('Memories reset.');"
scripts.reset:all: npm run reset:world && npm run reset:memories
